name: Lion of Judah Tee
purpose: A bold black tee featuring the Lion of Judah crowned with thorns.
why: Revelation 5:5 declares that the Lion of the tribe of Judah has triumphed.

name: Crown 33 Tee
purpose: A clean everyday tee centered on the crown-of-thorns 33 mark.
why: The Crown 33 mark keeps the focus on Christ, the crown of thorns, and a life lived without vanity.

name: Prayer Cross Tee
purpose: A simple cross design reminding believers to live prayerfully.
why: Christ strengthens us and prayer keeps us anchored.

name: Cross & Discipleship Tee
purpose: A discipleship tee rooted in taking up the cross daily.
why: Luke 9:23 calls believers to deny themselves, take up the cross daily, and follow Jesus.

name: Crimson Worm Tee
purpose: A teaching tee based on Psalm 22:6 and the crimson worm picture.
why: Psalm 22:6 says, “But I am a worm, and no man.” This design points to sacrifice, scarlet covering, and new life in Christ.

name: No Vanity 33 Tee
purpose: The clean brand tee for everyday wear.
why: This design carries the heart of the brand: whatever we do, we do all to the glory of God.

name: YAHWEH White Tee
purpose: A clean YAHWEH design pointing to the name of God revealed in Exodus.
why: Exodus 3:14 reveals God as I AM THAT I AM.
